name: Rand Paul
subject: bust through the gatekeepers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The second major Presidential debate takes
place Wednesday night.

And I'm certain the Washington Machine's
gatekeepers in the press will attempt to silence and stamp out my
message of liberty.

But with your help, I can get around their
wall and take my message straight to the American people.

So please stand with me today by chipping in
as generously as you can to help me put my brand new TV ad on the
air in key presidential primary states.

Fellow Conservative, I don't get the big checks from the
well-entrenched special interests.

They know I'm not "their guy."

My campaign depends entirely on grassroots
patriots like you to defeat the Washington Machine and get our
country back on track.

And I'm counting on you to chip in a
contribution right away.

Your contribution will help me reach out and
inform more voters about . . .

. . . My 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax Plan that
will blow up the tax code, return $2 TRILLION to the American
people and create 1.4 million new jobs in the process . . .

. . . My plan to impose term limits on career
Washington, D.C. politicians and actually force Congress to read
the bills they vote on are critical steps to actually reforming
Congress . . .

. . . My Audit the Fed bill to finally expose
corruption, cronyism and secrecy in our nation's out-of-control
secret bank is critical to stopping never-ending boom-bust
economic cycles that rob so many Americans blind . . .

. . . My pledges to repeal 100% of ObamaCare
and protect the ENTIRE Bill of Rights are critical to ensuring
every American the freedom and prosperity that should be their
birthright . . .

. . . And my track-record of DELIVERING on
the promises I make.

Today I'm counting on you to help me get this
message out to as many voters as possible.

So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to
help me take my message straight to the American people.

Chip in $10
immediately >>

Chip in $25
immediately >>

Chip in $50
immediately >>

Chip in $100
immediately >>

Or donate another
amount >>

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isS3JFimNT

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osS3JFimNT

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-29086249838-echo3-FEB22FDA6BE05010A3B5D8BEB95258F2@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----
http://www.paramountcommunication.com

name: Mike Mikus
subject: URGENT: Pat Toomey launches re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
| **URGENT: Pat Toomey officially launches re-election campaign for U.S. Senate**
[**We can 't afford six more years of Toomey: Rush $10 now to support Katie >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-993160167283490816/-7651314500716462080?refcode=20150913e&amount=15)
---

Friend --

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-993160167283490816/-7651314500716462080?refcode=20150913e&amount=15)
---
Here's a preview of what Pennsylvanians can expect if Pat Toomey is re-elected:
* **No pay raise for Pennsylvania families** _(He voted against raising the federal minimum wage -- TWICE.)_

* **Women 's access to healthcare rolled back** _(He voted multiple times to defund Planned Parenthood, which provides critical services to thousands of Pennsylvania women and men.)_

* **The end of Medicare as we know it** _(He voted three times to turn Medicare into a voucher program, which would impact over 4 million Pennsylvanians.)_

* **College expenses continuing to skyrocket** _(He voted against an amendment that would have made college more affordable for our students.)_

And that's just the start. Toomey has repeatedly put special interests ahead of Pennsylvania families.

[**Today is supposed to be a big day for Pat Toomey -- but let 's make it a big day for Katie instead. Pitch in $10 today and help us raise $10,000 from grassroots donors who want to see a new U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-993160167283490816/-7651314500716462080?refcode=20150913e&amount=15)

**Pat Toomey has had years to prove himself as a leader, but all he 's proven is that he puts partisan politics ahead of people.**

Toomey voted against the Paycheck Fairness Act FIVE TIMES, despite the fact that women in Pennsylvania face a staggering wage gap, earning 24% less than their male counterparts. Toomey also voted to block legislation that would have expanded health care, job training benefits, and education for veterans.

He even voted against protecting manufacturers and workers by closing trade loopholes. That's right, he voted against helping the industries that form a cornerstone of Pennsylvania's economy.

**Toomey 's voting record makes it clear: He's wrong for Pennsylvania and it's time for a change. That's why Katie is running for Senate, and that's why she needs your help today.**

[**As Pat Toomey announces his re-election bid, we need to send a clear message that Pennsylvanians are ready for new leadership. Contribute $10 today to support Katie 's grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-993160167283490816/-7651314500716462080?refcode=20150913e&amount=15)

Let's do this,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-993160167283490816/-7651314500716462080?refcode=20150913e&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-993160167283490816/-7723372094754390016).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Friend, what do you want to hear?
body:
Friend -

The second GOP debate of the 2016 election is only 3 days away and before I take the stage, I want to hear from you.

[**Will you take 10 seconds right now before this big debate to let me know what issue is most important to you?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xdslkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqydbcbd_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Hearing the concerns of voters is one of the most important parts about running for President. To me, it's a big part of what leadership is all about - identifying the challenges facing Americans across the country and then putting forward real solutions to address them.

Here's my commitment to you in advance of Wednesday's debate: **I 'm going to talk about my conservative ideas and how to move this country forward.**

I believe every candidate on stage owes it to the American people to provide more than the same-old political talking points. [**But to do that, Friend, I need to hear from you.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/amtzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcmplpk_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Take our one-question survey now and let me know what issue you'd like the candidates to focus on.

**It takes less than 10 seconds, I promise. Get started now, only 3 days to go:[Jeb2016.com/Debate-Survey/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hvwrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdvwfwb_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

Jeb

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3695&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: hi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me in Las Vegas? | Friend --

When I take the stage in Las Vegas at the first Democratic debate of this election, it will mean so much to know that a few of my best supporters are in the audience cheering me on.

**Today the campaign is launching a contest -- and if you win, you could fly out and meet me at the debate next month. Add your name to enter right now:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-at-the-debate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/24/2015 and 9/20/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive tickets for them and a guest to attend the Democratic debate, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the debate and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM0OTQ3MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxMzM3OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mark Campbell
subject: Ted Cruz Wins FreedomWorks Straw Poll BIG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:
| | | | | Email not displaying correctly? [View it](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyw-2BbnaC6WIsdqAHO01HbsUbliT8AXmaobwEZw1WoyqUSMJ-2Bn5LW-2FYB-2F8K-2Fzm1wYXXQmd6-2B2pTBrcjvZctNVF-2FTlGkcNWCBYr1l4Qg4wX64y95cmt8eR9yAhsxZWVSI7ng28QU7R63pAsFQRDCKtZHwJgdPWiwSNSk9xsVhRiVGMAFlAzk-2FUktUzxqnWJzTTA2ZinGhntCNUWBHDgd-2F6bt1hZhk0wkD2IDPTBbD31y5KUkfO1LtXJu90ai9-2B-2F9Ye2rnltYPmAd0cil8MioS0vWJB8SDu4Cd6CrB1LQbmkKfiI_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGb9bM8MHb7myyfrIQd1ZArUPaZMiWnYb49Yov2If-2Fguas-2FWPRKCyV806uarenvdsq1DjLpgvSqx6BquusBV5EQuxNfDcWcThmQgAikrmD3OlD6qlw8zPsxS01cEMIXKnyTZY2toM88gd6MbcxuvR1jgJGNEMRolZEhCDyoQg9Drxx5vOkPhp0dNNK7kw-2FpuhBllLhIBplNrMHngxgO002hf6j9HeZxMtK-2BqzqaUGdjDIYkRbFGjzBZ28aI0it-2BDwDDZVyBwMEF8Y65-2FxmwJ6Wls2MmynxBtuMIAiPHFTcr4Y23HmFCvvpi2qLaLCzyAcU2vUXVJz2luuPhk343483rnPMCaCXXGMPojveahdde5UOM0PthleDikGez2jkIlKE-3D) in your browser
---
---
|
---
---
| Dear Friend,

I know it is Sunday afternoon, so I'll make this quick.

This weekend, over 2,500 grassroots activists from across the country gathered in Orlando, FL, for the FreedomWorks 9/12 Summit, and one of the things on the agenda was a straw poll for the 2016 Presidential race.

The results were overwhelming -- **[Ted took first place with 41% of the vote](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFN5-2F2oz6ILLTCED9UqnAyfU2kMYZBduukM5Dr-2B-2BTeYN5Z7O10G02I8c0jTSumf0aTcR-2B-2FlVeY7lwVvXqIs4FRT-2FPtaVsB13DkApW-2BVdCig0CdcVwIEwuBaCkDuzYMH4FYA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGb9bM8MHb7myyfrIQd1ZArYI4J9QzJcn22d-2BmO7tBqCqIvCNRqD7W-2FKcSGvN44C87Eck2dUgq-2FRMBEauXGuILr5KHbF3woWfiQ345Oqkvbvpp0OO-2FU5v5RIDWhYZjFnJSE8-2FS9JEn5TXNxWwMcTqiuHA-2BAAF36mmCsYqdfJJK31stuCNFlkUHitijZPWnzjNTWX-2BE8c9Y25BMRrcYBRRMnf0SrEjsOKtBRGm7Kq4aErvxKq7rMntm8jLAk9i0pMbw-2F27USowc3iSEf0IB57m995Ixjq8NzvhifRjLA3rJW72tPUWW9-2BImXbldLowhJdXkBcJqfIl1iAlKo8MT-2BahHlua9EGgH7GzamXavx9Qo9VhN5VzZwbydrErQsG4-2Be4XU-3D) _beating the next closest contender by nearly 30 points_!**

This incredible news comes only days after Ted earned endorsements by both [Gun Owners of America](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzyPijdWQKni8H2XUPiTfShpZ83dipcrh5O-2BDBAOpmYFTo408R-2BgOpLQfnnixQ8zai0LOn4FHAQiiiWAya4Fp9v_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGb9bM8MHb7myyfrIQd1ZArRzrTkUxrdLiW2a4hlPPxjU1C3lIvwtZL5nqye7QTrh1NiSC-2FeMM-2F4-2BdSB9mBbBsiskUvhgc8jy6n39wb6lzVu-2BHQe1GYbAm7d-2BphIf0C8Pe65W-2B-2Blw88P4g2YP6Jn-2BLIkGZZKwKJC3rQr-2BTRr7K0vEJ5ikkPUbWbX2599piC3Wrf-2BH8UsaQ9ZofVnQGv6OGT6dz2LTlEwNMZguVf24pw19DfNLxSKJndELdaFq8NtxOCCwjNkYu6v-2BUjpeYCG-2FSsKyOdMywlIhi-2BoQ-2BTnBiBeAd1UAe3-2BeLrjnBOfWKMBtiIFwAMPheMm5gjBriA0IeR6WZ8oupl5BbEadGJINI9WJhVo2RyMzGrR8L-2FziHH66o-3D) and the [National Federation of Republican Assemblies](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzYEHvXgVpMGoey6pAtFxyisu97uXGaNyLQr-2FHGYl04fYRIVScyiP5Qct71Hc4jFatJBgGNnIGqb6ZCWCUIJXWCYtxyr6HzGJcqGtwjwm7RSe7J5WxDZLsHv17kE4wtXDI-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGb9bM8MHb7myyfrIQd1ZArhSXdl3o5Y32Yt1sz65-2Fro6C4teTjsg9fEnvj040xyGqJdoFrNLntulCsXW3AOsSAOUhtXdRv6zHcik0VoRVwmkpQny6RE2wUP7wYm0Xs-2FiwA8py6Xml6vfJ6qBi744NS0FRDoDL9IALh9mkwFKocwnqyzPFidJUBpT3dKgBqcIoAdHOOusdDoqnd9VGCLjXRiiBoP-2FxqhsMQrF1aqJijzINbO3R4fGiyMvG-2BVczNNT8WjNbstyqfX9asbm-2B2fF6Yt9DttJW7KhoMQmdzHjIkBKKAkfQ65RjPx7ZcOT1LO9nFTRwFe2F8DI0tkxJeXmaIUory5i1N5u9YeZIKG2-2FoGWVFpj9mp3pfRI3RZlXtiZ4-3D).

Momentum is building for this campaign, and we need your help to keep it up. First, if you haven't yet, [please click here to volunteer with our campaign](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjxA3yE7G3hg-2BmzTofDoefbO_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGb9bM8MHb7myyfrIQd1ZAr-2Bk-2Bms5Qc8f-2BVuZRbAVshbSwDDeNU9O409qDMkIZHBPMNHn6Wlo0Y7rERLBzBn4yEMA6WIwlG9qXCREycZcm7koEjnqr3it-2F943NOttwFMO0y5SnVPQPtDfUiYktlkjPMcYb6rhRcTpB8zdIoCDIknHlEh1UYg3ey3DVVQ7qWkVBSpYtlP7mXEW-2FozCOd24oboZU60LZsebsm6Rtwtng09xzabg1AhSbsiZa-2FnByuDgrYyM82OMKbHlu6WkuyrF-2F0yR59sTS1IcAt-2Ffq-2FGLfTQq4hUUlA3O1TIZyjkDeZ2g6vUKASnTlNSS-2Bpm3n14qHRWlHqQWs3oDF4UsIpcUfKir-2B6W18YDymVR76lHP1ZKgA-3D). clean_body: | | | | | Email not displaying correctly? in your browser | | Dear Friend, I know it is Sunday afternoon, so I'll make this quick. This weekend, over 2,500 grassroots activists from across the country gathered in Orlando, FL, for the FreedomWorks 9/12 Summit, and one of the things on the agenda was a straw poll for the 2016 Presidential race. The results were overwhelming -- beating the next closest contender by nearly 30 points! This incredible news comes only days after Ted earned endorsements by both and the . Momentum is building for this campaign, and we need your help to keep it up. First, if you haven't yet, . And once you've done that, because together, we're going to win.
